testcase.name: launch

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: Chrome instance exited. Examine ChromeDriver verbose log to determine the cause. Host info: host: 'runnervmnay03', ip: '10.1.0.164' Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.14.0-1017-azure', java.version: '17.0.18' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--proxy-bypass-list=<-loopb..., --disable-dev-shm-usage, --window-size=1366,768, --no-sandbox, --disable-gpu], binary: /usr/bin/google-chrome, excludeSwitches: [enable-automation, load-extension], extensions: [], prefs: {credentials_enable_service: false, download.default_directory: /home/runner/work/checkly/c..., plugins.always_open_pdf_externally: true, profile.default_content_setting_values.automatic_downloads: 1, profile.password_manager_enabled: false, safebrowsing.enabled: true}}, pageLoadStrategy: normal, unhandledPromptBehavior: accept}]}] selenide.url: https://app.checklyhq.com selenide.baseUrl: https://app.checklyhq.com

skipped.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: Chrome instance exited. Examine ChromeDriver verbose log to determine the cause. Host info: host: 'runnervmnay03', ip: '10.1.0.164' Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.14.0-1017-azure', java.version: '17.0.18' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--proxy-bypass-list=<-loopb..., --disable-dev-shm-usage, --window-size=1366,768, --no-sandbox, --disable-gpu], binary: /usr/bin/google-chrome, excludeSwitches: [enable-automation, load-extension], extensions: [], prefs: {credentials_enable_service: false, download.default_directory: /home/runner/work/checkly/c..., plugins.always_open_pdf_externally: true, profile.default_content_setting_values.automatic_downloads: 1, profile.password_manager_enabled: false, safebrowsing.enabled: true}}, pageLoadStrategy: normal, unhandledPromptBehavior: accept}]}] selenide.url: https://app.checklyhq.com selenide.baseUrl: https://app.checklyhq.com
